name: google-ads-mcp-server
description: Google Ads MCP Server with full API coverage and multi-account OAuth2 support

scripts.build: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --outfile=dist/index.js --format=esm --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);"
